title: Easy With Marinda – Marlene le Roux

seo.title: Easy With Marinda - Marlene le Roux - Marinda Kook

html:
I only know one woman who laughs harder than I do, and that's Marlene le Roux. This bubbly friend of mine is the CEO of Artscape Theatre. We've walked this road together for 20 years.

Marlene lost her son, Adam, to death a year ago at the age of 15. When I first asked her to cook with me, she wasn't up for it. Adam's death took a piece of her sunshine with him. But we decided to cook for him, her king.
What a feast it was.
And she started turning her face back toward the sun….
Tune in Thursday at 17:30 on VIA, channel 147 for this special episode.
